Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-27-2009 Continued To Jun-22-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number 272358 Res. Trusts By Hattie E. Ebner.

Appearances: Lillian Wolf for Robert Sylva, Jr. and Marily Badger.

The Court stated that a capacity declaration stating that Mary lacks capacity was needed and that 5 day personal service was required. The Court also stated that a declination from Wells Fargo Bank was needed and that bond would be required on both matters. The matters were continued to June 5, 2009. The Court informed that the appointment of Marily as Guardian Ad Litem can be requested by way of an ex parte petition.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Sum.
